overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character with a large backpack and weapon walking down a foggy, abandoned forest road. The scene features wet cracked asphalt, tall pine trees, and low visibility due to heavy morning fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned forest highway with overgrown verges

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the cracked asphalt road, weapon slung on back, heading toward the green shelter in the distance

entered.detail: weathered rectangular signpost on the left side of the road
small structure with green angled roof, likely an abandoned bus stop or information board
large moss-covered boulder formation on the right roadside
dense tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the road, fading into fog
dense tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the road, fading into fog
weathered two-lane road with double yellow lines, cracked and wet with puddles

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a cracked, wet asphalt road through a dense foggy forest. A rectangular road sign stands on the left while a green-roofed shelter and rocky outcrop appear ahead on the right. Tall pine trees line both sides of the road, barely visible through the heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest road continuing into the mist

events.description: passing a diamond-shaped road sign on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk down the foggy road, moving deeper into the forest as the green shelter falls behind

entered.detail: diamond-shaped warning sign on the right side of the road, approaching from the fog

segments.scene_description: Having passed the green shelter and initial road sign, the character continues deeper into the foggy forest. A diamond-shaped road sign appears on the right side and is passed as the journey continues. The cracked road stretches ahead into the mist, flanked by dense evergreen forest on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate, wet road that leads deeper into a dense and oppressive foggy forest. It begins with the character walking past a rectangular road sign on the left, moving toward a green-roofed shelter and a rocky outcrop on the right. As the character passes the shelter, the camera continues forward, maintaining its path along the cracked asphalt while tall pine trees loom through the heavy mist. The scene then shifts as a diamond-shaped road sign appears and is passed on the right side of the road. Finally, the journey extends further into the gray haze, with the road stretching ahead into an increasingly thick evergreen wilderness.
